chapter_title: Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
text: This chapter applies only to a county with a population of 350,000 or more.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 282. Toll Underpass or Tunnel in Certain Counties
##### § 282.001 — Applicability of Chapter

This chapter applies only to a county with a population of 350,000 or more.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter applies only to a county with a population of 350,000 or more.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
